Weight & Calorie Data

Date Weight (kg) Trend (kg) Calories TDEE (kcal) Balance

Settings

Applies to the hero card, vital stats, goal form, and widgets using the shared formatter. Some detailed analytics still show kg.

Controls supported user-facing forms and summaries.

Used by weekly summaries and future calendar-style views.

Saving reprocesses the chart and derived widgets.

Turn this off to reduce chart and card transitions immediately.

0.5x is slower; 2x is snappier.

Export goals, annotations, manual entries, settings, and other browser-saved app data.

Import a previous Settings export. A preview and stronger confirmation are planned in the data pass.

Remove all saved app data from this browser. This cannot be undone.
